pokemon:melmetal.name: Melmetal
pokemon:melmetal.summary: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.
At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.
